---
title: "R Onboarding Guide"
subtitle: "A Beginner-Friendly Introduction to R, RStudio, and Data"
author: "Course Team"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: scrartcl
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include index.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 01-rstudio.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 02-first-script.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 03-quarto-rmarkdown.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 04-running-code.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 05-files-folders.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 06-download-csv.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 07-importing-data.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 08-getting-results.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 09-common-problems.qmd >}}

\newpage

{{< include 10-cheatsheet.qmd >}}
